text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It is I! La rapida y furiosa—the fast and furious—El Condorrr Pasaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My dream's to become the greatest racer the
world's ever seen! I will prove that I am la numero
una en el mundo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to waste looking down at the
ground! And looking back isn't allowed either!
Watch as I soar across el cielooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
